description: Composition White shorts made of 98% cotton and 2% elastane, has a buttoned and zippered waist, belt loops on waist, pockets on the sides, two buttonable patch pockets on the back and embroidered branding on the left thighFitRegularWash careGentle machine wash with like colours in lukewarm water at 40 degreesDo not bleachDo not tumble dryCool ironDo not dry cleanComfort in small size, this pair of shorts makes for great summer wear. The cotton fabric keeps you dry and fresh throughout the day as you enjoy the warm sun. The zippered and buttoned front allow the broad waistband to stay snug, while the loops allow you to wear a stylish belt to complete your high-fashion look. Great to wear to the beach or gym, team this with classy art canvas shoes for style.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and waist 26& rdquo
